name: Stripe
summary: Stripe provides payment processing infrastructure for online businesses.

name: Airbnb
summary: Airbnb operates a global marketplace platform connecting hosts and guests for short-term lodging.

name: Figma
summary: Figma builds a collaborative web-based interface design tool for real-time team collaboration.

name: Vercel
summary: Vercel builds a platform for frontend developers to deploy and collaborate on web applications with serverless infrastructure.

name: Netlify
summary: Netlify provides a cloud platform for deploying and hosting web applications, with a focus on static sites and serverless functions.

name: Scale AI
summary: Scale AI builds tools for labeling and annotating data used to train artificial intelligence and machine learning models.

name: Anthropic
summary: Anthropic develops large-scale AI language models for enterprise and developer use.

name: Mistral
summary: Mistral builds open-source large language models for AI developers.

name: Linear
summary: Linear builds a platform for product development that integrates AI tools for teams and agents.

name: Clerk
summary: Clerk builds full-stack React components and hooks for user and organization management.

name: Supabase
summary: Supabase builds a Postgres development platform offering Database, Auth, Storage, Edge Functions, Realtime, and Vector Search.
